subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1913-05-03
subcodes.first_line: On this journey many souls were set aglow with the fire of the love of God and they became exceedingly attracted to the Cause.
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @perfection; imperfection of nature, @man's distinction from the animal, @the mind's power of discovery, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization
